name: product-design-plugins
description: Marketplace bundling product-design skills (product-architecture, behavior-first-design, visual-design).

plugins.name: product-design
plugins.description: Product design skills that produce specs (structural / visual / behavior) consumed by superpowers:writing-plans downstream. Three guided dialogues across Garrett's Elements of UX: product-architecture (Strategy/Scope/Structure) + visual-design (Surface) + behavior-first-design (Skeleton).
